scope: R8 identity, value, and physical placement
promotion_rule: the factory assembly drawing establishes R8 identity beside D1; the registered owner component photograph establishes its populated landing centres, lead pitch, and visible value bands; electrical connectivity comes only from direct owner continuity

factory_drawing.observation: R8 is the single vertical axial body immediately left of the top half of D1

owner_board.coordinate_system: original source-image pixels transformed through the registered D1 component affine

target.observation: the unique populated vertical body in the factory-defined slot has red-black-red bands and photographed drill separation consistent with 10.16 mm pitch

electrical_evidence: direct owner continuity recorded 2026-07-19 closes R8 between D94.1 and +5 V
